datasync.task.taskschedule.CfnAbout: Specifies the schedule you want your task to use for repeated executions. For more information, see [Schedule Expressions for Rules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/events/ScheduledEvents.html).

datasync.task.taskschedule.ScheduleExpre.Description: A cron expression that specifies when AWS DataSync initiates a scheduled transfer from a source to a destination location.
